content_of_post_to_comment: Don’t surrender your heaven to those who dragged you through hell. Not everyone deserves access to the peace you fought so hard to find. Some people only knew you when you were surviving. They saw your tears, your exhaustion, your sleepless nights. But they were absent when you slowly rebuilt yourself. So don’t feel guilty for protecting what you’ve created. Your joy. Your healing. Your quiet life. Your peace. Your peace is not selfish. It is expensive. You paid for it with pieces of yourself. Not everyone who witnessed your pain has earned a seat at your table when peace finally arrives. Protect your heaven. They had no problem pushing you toward hell.
